0.description: Users are requesting a platform to create and manage a small community forum, including essential moderation capabilities.

1.use_case: Painful Table View Experience on MacBook
1.description: MacBook users find the table view feature difficult and painful to use, highlighting a critical usability problem.

2.description: Users inquire about the difficulty of adding new features, trackers, or notification systems to the product.

3.description: A flexible platform for managing diverse operational tasks, tracking projects, and streamlining workflows across various business and personal needs.

4.description: Users perceive the current UI as crowded and request simplification to enhance clarity and user experience.

5.description: Users report timezones are incorrectly displayed, often off by two hours, and suspect issues with UTC handling after no user changes.

6.use_case: Mobile Spacing Issues: Header and List Overlap
6.description: Users report mobile display issues where header and list elements overlap, causing incorrect spacing.

7.description: Users require distinct permissions based on their roles, such as administrators versus normal users, to manage system access effectively.

8.description: Users need audit logs to track who changed what and when for security and compliance.

9.description: Users are repeatedly encountering 401 errors even when they are actively logged into the system, preventing them from performing actions.

10.description: Users aim to build applications for streamlining various business operations, such as service booking, dispatch, inventory, and shipments.

11.description: Users are encountering various glitches and functionality problems when using the product specifically within the Safari web browser.

12.description: Users consistently express a strong preference for lightweight and minimalist designs, actively avoiding anything that feels heavy or cumbersome.

13.description: Users seek guidance on managing duplicate data entries when importing information from Excel spreadsheets into the system.

14.description: Users want to export their currently filtered data view into a CSV file for external analysis or sharing.

15.description: Users frequently ask for a dark mode toggle to enhance visual comfort and reduce eye strain during use.

16.use_case: Verify RLS and Permissions for Sensitive Data
16.description: Users want to ensure Row-Level Security and permissions are correctly configured for sensitive data storage.

17.description: Users seek fundamental usage statistics and funnel analysis to understand product engagement and conversion.

18.use_case: Secure Secret Management with Environment Variables
18.description: Users are requesting to avoid hardcoding secrets and instead use environment variables for secure configuration.

19.description: Users are experiencing a persistent redirect loop after attempting to log in, preventing access to the application.

20.description: Users are concerned about potential issues with CORS and authentication redirects, requesting a thorough double-check for stability.

21.description: Users want to deploy applications on Fly.io to avoid the complexities and responsibilities of self-hosting.

22.description: Enhance the visual design of empty states to make them more appealing and less 'sad' for users.

23.description: Users want to know if the app can connect to their existing authentication or database systems like OAuth, Firebase, or Postgres.

24.description: Users are expressing frustration and directly asking for help, indicating they are stuck and need assistance.

25.description: Users want to know if Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) can be added later, emphasizing future planning.

26.description: Users express a strong need to integrate with Webhooks for various external data transfer purposes.

27.use_case: Blank Page After Save Button Click
27.description: Users encounter a blank page after clicking save, preventing them from completing their work and shipping.

28.description: Ensure that private notes are only visible to their respective owners, maintaining user confidentiality and data privacy.

29.description: Users report a bug where applied filters are not persistent and reset upon page refresh, causing frustration.
